daily_take.headline: Nationals-Pirates jumped 31 points overnight. Smart money chasing or sharp fade?
daily_take.deck: The Nationals just became a massive favorite at 71.5%, up from 40.5% in 24 hours on $1.7M volume. That's not organic movement. Either the market repriced a starting pitcher injury/scratch, or retail is piling in on a meme pick. Check the injury reports before the first pitch. If both teams are healthy, this screams overbet and the Pirates offer real value at nearly even money.
